Our Services

Classic Haircut

Precision cut tailored to your head shape and personal style. Includes wash & blow-dry.

R150
🧲
Hot Towel Shave

Traditional straight-razor shave with warm towel treatment. Leaves skin smooth and refreshed.

R120
⚡
Fade & Design

High, mid, or low fade with custom line art. Express your individuality with precision edge work.

R200
👑
Full Groom Package

Haircut + beard trim + hot towel shave + scalp treatment. The full Msimang experience.

R380
🦿
Beard Sculpt

Shape, trim, and define your beard. Edge work included for a clean, polished finish.

R100
👦
Kids' Cut

Gentle, patient haircuts for boys under 12. Includes a lollipop on us.

R90
💈
Our Story
More Than a Haircut

Msimang & Co. was born out of a simple belief: every man deserves to walk out of a barbershop feeling like the best version of himself. Founded by Sipho Msimang in Durban's vibrant Berea neighbourhood, we've built a space where craft, culture, and community meet.

Our barbers are trained in both classic and contemporary techniques — from low fades to full beard sculpts — using only premium grooming products. Walk in. Sit down. Leave sharp.

6+
Years in Business
4
Expert Barbers
5k+
Happy Clients
100%
Passion Guaranteed
